EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Malware is blocked in traffic on host {event_src.host}. Action: {object.state}.
Malware "{object.name}" is blocked on host {event_src.host} in traffic between hosts {src.host}:{src.port} and {dst.host}:{dst.port}. Action: {object.state}.
Malware is detected on host {event_src.host} in traffic between hosts {src.host}:{src.port} and {dst.host}:{dst.port}
The connection between hosts {src.host}:{src.port} and {dst.host}:{dst.port} is blocked. Action: {object.state}.
